articles.title: Letterboxd, the social platform for film buffs, reportedly looking for new owner
articles.description: Potential buyers of Letterboxd include Versant, the parent company of CNBC and MS NOW, and Hollywood media company The Ankler, according to Semafor.
articles.author: Lucas Ropek

articles.title: Consumers lost $2.1B to social media scams in 2025, FTC reports
articles.description: The agency reports that losses from social media scams have increased eightfold and that social media scams resulted in higher losses than any other
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
articles.description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
articles.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding
articles.author: Anna Heim

articles.title: Hacker who allegedly carried out cyberattacks for China is extradited to US
articles.description: Xu Zewei is accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that broke into thousands of U.S. organizations and stole COVID-19-related
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
articles.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Data center demand drives 66% surge in natural gas power plant costs
articles.description: Natural gas power plant costs have nearly doubled in two years and take 23% longer to build as data center electricity demand skyrockets.
articles.author: Tim De Chant

articles.title: What’s behind Europe’s efforts to ditch US software in favor of sovereign tech
articles.description: Governments across Europe are looking to rely less on American tech providers.
articles.author: Anna Heim

articles.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
articles.description: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.
articles.author: Kate Park

articles.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
articles.description: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Critical infrastructure giant Itron says it was hacked
articles.description: The American technology giant provides water and energy monitoring and utility meters to hundreds of millions of homes and businesses.
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: Spotify’s next frontier: Fitness content
articles.description: Spotify is adding fitness as its next major category, launching workout videos, playlists, and Peloton classes inside the app for free and Premium
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space
articles.description: Overview Energy's first contract with Meta is a small step toward a future of space-based solar power.
articles.author: Tim Fernholz

articles.title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
articles.description: As growth slows, Truecaller is leaning on subscriptions, business services, and new features to sustain momentum beyond India.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh
